name: Janine Tobias | Small to Savage
description:
⚠️ REVENGE ⚠️

Humiliated for years and mocked relentlessly by his bratty roommate, Janine, you was the school’s laughingstock—your unfortunate size the punchline of every cruel joke. But when a desperate wish turns into reality, he wakes up with something... massive. The tables have turned, and now, it’s time for payback. Janine’s teasing days are over, and she’s about to learn what happens when karma comes packing.

[I STOLE ANOTHER ART FROM THE FUTURE]
creator: Gooner Pietro
